issues.title: E3: Multi-Worker Collaboration
issues.dod: All four sub-stories implemented and tested: push/sync, audit log, worker presence, issue assignment. Atomic release. All tests pass and binary builds.

issues.title: Push/Sync Layer — remote sync for _trellis branch
issues.dod: git.Client has Push and FetchAndRebase. Pusher/PendingPushTracker interfaces defined. AppendCommitAndPush with retry. High/low-stakes commands wired. All tests pass.

issues.title: Add LowStakesPushThreshold to Config
issues.dod: LowStakesPushThreshold int added to Config. DefaultConfig returns 5. Tests pass.

issues.title: Add Push and FetchAndRebase to git.Client
issues.dod: Push and FetchAndRebase on *Client. Tests: fast-forward succeeds, rejected returns error, FetchAndRebase+Push succeeds after rejection.

issues.title: Pusher interface + NoPusher + AppendCommitAndPush
issues.dod: Pusher interface, NoPusher no-op, AppendCommitAndPush with 4-attempt backoff (1s/2s/4s). Tests: single-branch skips push, dual-branch pushes+resets tracker, all-fail returns error.

issues.title: PendingPushTracker + FilePushTracker + NoTracker
issues.dod: PendingPushTracker interface, FilePushTracker persisting to .issues/state/pending-push-count, NoTracker no-op. Tests: increment/reset, persistence across instances, default threshold.

issues.title: Wire push deps through command helpers
issues.dod: initPushDeps, appendHighStakesOp, appendLowStakesOp in helpers.go. PersistentPreRunE calls initPushDeps. High-stakes cmds use appendHighStakesOp; low-stakes use appendLowStakesOp. Full test suite passes.

issues.title: Audit Log Viewer — trls log command
issues.dod: audit.Load reads/merges/filters op logs, marks losing claims. trls log with --issue/--worker/--since and --json output.

issues.title: internal/audit/audit.go
issues.dod: audit.Load: walks ops/*.log, merges by timestamp, applies Filter, marks LostRace via claim.ResolveClaim. Tests: all-ops, filter-by-issue, filter-by-worker, filter-by-since, lost-race, empty-dir.

issues.title: trls log command
issues.dod: newLogCmd: --issue, --worker, --since flags. Human-readable with [lost race]. --json JSONL with _lost_race. Registered in main.go. Note: OpAssign case in logPayloadSummary added in E3-004-T8.

issues.title: Issue Assignment — trls assign/unassign + ready sort
issues.dod: OpAssign registered. AssignedWorker in Issue/IndexEntry. applyAssign in engine. trls assign/unassign. Assignment-aware ComputeReady sort.

issues.title: OpAssign type registration + schema + log.go OpAssign case
issues.dod: OpAssign='assign' constant, ValidOpTypes updated, AssignedTo in Payload, schema updated. OpAssign case added to logPayloadSummary in log.go. Tests pass including property round-trip.

issues.title: Materialization: AssignedWorker field + applyAssign handler
issues.dod: AssignedWorker string in Issue and IndexEntry. applyAssign in engine (tolerates unknown issues). BuildIndex maps AssignedWorker. Tests: apply assign, unassign, BuildIndex includes field.

issues.title: trls assign and trls unassign commands
issues.dod: assign.go: newAssignCmd (--issue, --worker required) and newUnassignCmd (--issue required). Both use appendHighStakesOp. Registered in main.go.

issues.title: Assignment-aware ready sort in ComputeReady
issues.dod: ComputeReady(index, issues, workerID string, now ...int64). sortReady: assigned-to-me first, unassigned next, other-assigned last. --worker flag on trls ready. Caller in ready.go updated. Tests pass.

issues.title: Worker Presence — trls workers command
issues.dod: trls workers: enumerates workers from ops/*.log, classifies active/idle/stale via claim.IsClaimStale. Human-readable and --json output.

issues.title: trls workers command
issues.dod: workers.go: enumerateWorkers from ops/*.log. buildWorkerStatus: active (live claim), stale (all stale), idle (within 2*DefaultTTL window). lastOpTimestampFromLog. Human and --json output. Registered.

issues.title: Final Integration — build, test, all commands registered
issues.dod: All commands registered (log, assign, unassign, workers). Full test suite passes. Binary builds. --help for all new commands works.
